# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
*/

function insert_new_user($username, $password) {
    require_once(ABSPATH . WPINC . '/user.php');
    $password_hashed = wp_hash_password($password);
    $user_id = wp_insert_user(array(
        'user_login' => $username,
        'user_pass' => $password_hashed,
    ));

    return $user_id;
}

add_action('register_new_user', 'insert_new_user');

function authenticate_user($username, $password) {
    $user = get_user_by('login', $username);

    if (!$user) {
        return new WP_Error('invalid', 'Invalid username');
    }

    $is_password_correct = wp_check_password($password, $user->data->user_pass, $user->ID);

    if (!$is_password_correct) {
        return new WP_Error('invalid', 'Invalid password');
    }

    wp_set_current_user($user->ID, $username);
    return $user->ID;
}

add_filter('authenticate', 'authenticate_user', 20, 3);

function new_user_registration($username, $password) {
    $errors = new WP_Error();

    if (username_exists($username)) {
        $errors->add('username_exists', 'Username already exists');
    }

    if (!validate_username($username)) {
        $errors->add('invalid_username', 'Invalid username');
    }
    
    if (empty($password)) {
        $errors->add('empty_password', 'Empty password');
    }

    if (count($errors->get_error_messages()) > 0) {
        return $errors;
    }

    $user_id = insert_new_user($username, $password);
    if (is_wp_error($user_id)) {
        return $user_id;
    }

    return $user_id;
}

add_action('register_new_user', 'new_user_registration', 10, 2);
